name: ig-iap-tunnel-action
description: GitHub Action to set up an IAP tunnel to a GCP instance group via ig-iap-tunnel

scripts.build: esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node24 --banner:js="import{createRequire as __cr}from'module';const require=__cr(import.meta.url);" --outfile=dist/index.js && esbuild src/post.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node24 --banner:js="import{createRequire as __cr}from'module';const require=__cr(import.meta.url);" --outfile=dist/post/index.js && node scripts/postbuild.mjs
scripts.all: npm run build && npm run test:dist && npm test
